package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for mapping_logic_duplicated_across_handlers: Repeated field mapping blocks across multiple handlers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule083NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule083NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule083NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario083Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule083NegativeService, input Rule083NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
